privacy.notes: Callback evidence uses synthetic smoke fixtures and redacted local paths only.

rootCause.summary: The visible Compare exit button was rendered inside the top draggable titlebar hit area. The menu command exited Compare because it bypassed pointer hit testing.
rootCause.fixedBoundary: Compare right information surface content is inset below the titlebar hit area.

validation.note: Required normal local permissions because sandboxed run cannot bind 127.0.0.1.
Smoke output reported shortTermDesignInteractionProof=true and passed=true.

ownerLocalStableApp.handoffRequirement: Release/Packaging or a clean local-stable promotion must refresh the owner-used app before QA regression on the owner baseline.

qaRegressionRequest.expectedResult: After entering Compare mode, a real pointer click on the visible page button exits to Preview; the View menu exit path remains working.
adjacentChecks: Enter Compare from the View menu.
Click the visible exit button with a real pointer.
Confirm the app leaves Compare mode.
Confirm View -> Exit Compare still leaves Compare mode.
Confirm the button remains visibly below the titlebar hit area at the tested window size.
